keyFeatures.zh: 保留原始质量和分辨率

description.en: Compress up to 50MB files, no watermarks
description.zh: 压缩最多50MB的文件，无水印

weaknesses.en: Limited file size for free tier
weaknesses.zh: 免费套餐文件大小有限制

weaknesses.en: No additional features for free tier

targetAudience.en: Individuals and small businesses who need to compress PDF files
targetAudience.zh: 需要压缩PDF文件的个人和小型企业

positioning.en: Specializes in efficient PDF compression without compromising quality
positioning.zh: 专注于高效PDF压缩，不牺牲质量
